title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.315 - False apprehension, arrest, confinement — court-martial
text:
40.315.  False apprehension, arrest, confinement — court-martial. — Any person subject to sections 40.005 to 40.490 who, except as provided by law or regulation, apprehends, arrests, restrains, or confines any person shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 98)
